overall.description: Static first-person view from a luxury high-rise apartment bedroom in a cyberpunk metropolis, looking out through a large panoramic window at a rainy night scene. The interior features modern furniture and rumpled bedding, while the exterior showcases a dense futuristic cityscape with neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and occasional flying vehicles passing through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: stationary position on or near the bed, gazing out at the rainy cyberpunk cityscape through the large window

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle passing horizontally across the window view from left to right

entered.detail: large panoramic window dominating the wall, revealing the cityscape outside with rain droplets on glass
unmade bed with silvery-white sheets and pillows in the immediate foreground
dense futuristic cityscape with illuminated skyscrapers, neon signs, and holographic billboards visible through the window
contemporary white upholstered bench or sofa against the left wall
dark textured wall with geometric square paneling behind the bench
recessed rectangular ceiling light fixture emitting warm artificial light

segments.scene_description: A static, atmospheric shot from a first-person perspective inside a modern luxury apartment bedroom. The camera overlooks a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape through a massive floor-to-ceiling window, with heavy rain creating a moody, hazy atmosphere. The room features contemporary furniture including a rumpled bed in the foreground and a white bench against a geometrically textured wall, while flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window against the backdrop of neon-lit skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a luxury bedroom that gazes out into a moody, rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by framing the intimate interior of the room, where a rumpled bed and a white bench against a textured wall establish a sense of quiet solitude. As the eye moves toward the massive floor-to-ceiling window, the focus shifts to the sprawling cityscape outside, veiled in a heavy, hazy rain. The scene then expands to reveal the scale of the futuristic environment, with neon-lit skyscrapers piercing the gloom while flying vehicles glide past the glass.
